article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service

briefs.title: Liquor Primary Licensees Can Now Offer Bottle Service — No Application Required
briefs.summary: Liquor Primary establishments (nightclubs, bars) are now automatically permitted to sell whole bottles of spirits as bottle service, subject to serving-size limits, last-hour restrictions, and bottle-control requirements.
briefs.action_required: Establish a bottle-control system and secure storage before offering bottle service to ensure compliance.
briefs.article_title: Liquor Primary licences may offer bottle service
